sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107089" key="u(pekprore/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπεκπρο-ρέω</orth>, <sense id="n107089.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flow up and out,</tr_> of water <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">running in and out of</tr_> a rock-basin, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0012.tlg002.perseus-grc1:87" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">87</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
